utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final package to the closest matching item name in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Rome, Italy' maps to destinations.Rome, Italy (rating 8). Transportation specifies Air Europa flights; Air Europa is a budget airline, and no cabin class is specified—default to budget airline economy, which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class (rating 2). Accommodation is 'Boutique Stay Hotel' which corresponds to accommodation.Boutique Stay (rating 7). Activities include golf, fine dining, and a walking tour: these map to activities.Golf Day (10), restaurants.Fine Dining Experience (10), and activities.City Walking Tour (9). Additional services include 'Airport taxi transfers' which maps to additional_hotel_services.Airport Taxi (rating 8).
